label: McLaren MCL39 starter OpenFOAM case

requiredUserInputs.label: Confirm model license
requiredUserInputs.description: Make sure you are allowed to publish the cleaned mesh and any derived screenshots or baked overlays on the website.

requiredUserInputs.label: Choose reference area and length
requiredUserInputs.description: Update `areaM2` and `lengthM` in `pipeline/openfoam/config/mcl39-baseline-15ms.example.json` before trusting Cd or Cl values.

requiredUserInputs.label: Export car surface CSV
requiredUserInputs.description: Save the solved car surface from ParaView to `pipeline/openfoam/exports/mcl39-baseline-15ms/car-surface.csv`.

requiredUserInputs.label: Finalize mesh binding
requiredUserInputs.description: Update `triangleCount` in the overlay config after you settle the render-mesh mapping.

outputs: surface VTK export for the car patch
notes: This is the first offline CFD scaffold for the site, not a final high-fidelity race-car aero setup.
Keep wheels fixed for the first run. Add rotating wheels and finer layers only after the baseline case converges.
Use the FS_CFD_database only as a comparison reference for workflow and visualization patterns, not as a direct F1 geometry overlay source.
